sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Veeco will post quarterly results after market close on May 5
feed.summary: Veeco (NASDAQ: VECO) is scheduled to release its first-quarter 2026 financial results after the market closes on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. The company will host a conference call on the same day at 5:00 PM ET to discuss the results, with dial-in options and a live webcast available. A replay of the webcast will be posted on Veeco's investor relations website at 8:00 PM ET that evening.

feed.title: S&P 500 Equal Weighted - ETF Tracker
feed.summary: This article provides an ETF Tracker for the S&P 500 Equal Weighted index, detailing various ETFs that track this index. It presents a comprehensive overview including return data, expense ratios, dividend information, holdings, tax rates, and technical indicators for these ETFs. The article also compares these ETFs with other large-cap blend equities ETFs, offering investment data and analysis.

feed.title: Uniti Group Inc. ($UNIT) President & CEO 2025 Pay Revealed
feed.summary: Uniti Group Inc.'s President & CEO, Kenneth A. Gunderman, is estimated to have received $9,194,673 in compensation in 2025, marking a 22.62% decrease from 2024. This data comes from a recent SEC DEF14A filing. The article also details recent insider trading activity, institutional investor holdings changes, and analyst price targets for UNIT stock.

feed.title: UPBOUND GROUP, INC. ($UPBD) Former CEO 2025 Pay Revealed
feed.summary: Quiver Quantitative reports that the former CEO of UPBOUND GROUP, INC. ($UPBD), Mitchell Fadel, is estimated to have received $6,978,541 in compensation in 2025, a 36.26% decrease from 2024. The article also details recent insider trading activity, institutional holdings changes, and analyst ratings for UPBD stock, including two "Buy" ratings and a median price target of $29.0.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Hock Ting Sells 5,800 Shares of Trio-Tech International (TRT)
feed.summary: Hock Ting, a Director at Trio-Tech International (TRT), sold 5,800 shares of the company on April 20, 2026. This transaction means Ting now owns 148,244 shares. The stock is considered significantly overvalued based on its GF Value, with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 2.09.

feed.title: Form 8-K TRINITY INDUSTRIES INC For: Apr 17
feed.summary: Trinity Industries Inc. (TRN) filed a Form 8-K on April 17, 2026, disclosing that its indirect subsidiary, Trinity Rail Leasing 2025 LLC (TRL-2025), issued $447,439,000 in Class A Secured Green Standard Railcar Notes and $33,360,000 in Class B Notes. These notes, bearing fixed interest rates of 5.35% and 5.56% respectively, are secured by a portfolio of railcars and operating leases. The proceeds will be used to redeem existing notes and for general corporate purposes, with repayment anticipated well before the 2056 maturity date if cash flow assumptions are met.

feed.title: Cleo Fields from Louisiana’s 6th district invests in Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Ltd. By Investing.com
feed.summary: Cleo Fields, a congressional representative from Louisiana's 6th district, recently invested between $1,001 and $15,000 in Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Ltd. (TSM) on April 9, 2026. This transaction was disclosed in a congressional trade report and reflects Fields' interest in the global tech sector. TSM, a leading semiconductor firm, has shown significant returns and is currently considered undervalued according to InvestingPro.

feed.title: Toll Brothers, Inc. Announces Acquisition of Buffington Homes to Expand Presence in Northwest Arkansas Market
feed.summary: Toll Brothers, Inc., a leading luxury home builder, has announced its acquisition of Buffington Homes of Arkansas, the largest luxury home builder in northwest Arkansas. This strategic move strengthens Toll Brothers' presence in the growing Fayetteville/Bentonville market, adding over 1,500 lots to its portfolio. The acquisition is expected to close in Toll Brothers’ fiscal third quarter, with Buffington's leadership team joining to ensure continuity and capitalize on local expertise.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Group (RCL) Shares Fall 3.8% -- GF Value Says Still Overvalued
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group (RCL) shares dropped 3.8% to $271.47, a price indicating a 33.3% overvaluation compared to its GF Value™ of $203.71. Despite a strong GF Score™ of 85/100, concerns arise from its low financial strength score, insider selling totaling $626.7 million, and no insider buying activity in the last three months. These factors suggest caution for potential investors due to a lack of margin of safety and potential downward pressure.

feed.title: Toll Brothers (TOL) Expands Presence with Buffington Homes Acqui
feed.summary: Toll Brothers Inc. (TOL) announced the acquisition of Buffington Homes of Arkansas, a move that will expand its presence in the Fayetteville/Bentonville market and enhance its focus on first-time and move-up buyers. The acquisition is expected to finalize in fiscal Q3 2026. The company boasts a strong GF Score™ of 93/100 and an attractive P/E ratio, though recent insider selling warrants investor caution.

feed.title: Toll Brothers expands luxury footprint with Buffington acquisition
feed.summary: Toll Brothers is acquiring Buffington Homes of Arkansas, marking its entry into the Northwest Arkansas market. This strategic acquisition brings 9 communities and over 1,500 lots, aligning with Toll Brothers' focus on luxury and affluent buyers in growing regions. The deal highlights the continued consolidation in the U.S. homebuilding industry and the importance of scale, discipline, and strong local land positions.

feed.title: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) Insider Kenneth Duda Sells 32,000 Shares
feed.summary: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) insider Kenneth Duda sold 32,000 shares of the company's stock for over $5.2 million, reducing his ownership by 71.15%. This sale was executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. The company's stock has recently traded up by 3.7% and analysts are broadly bullish on ANET following strong quarterly earnings, with multiple upgrades and an average target price near $177.83.

feed.title: Microsoft signals pause in funding for carbon dioxide removal market
feed.summary: Microsoft, a major player in the nascent carbon dioxide removal (CDR) market, is reportedly pausing future purchases from partners, signaling a potential shift from its aggressive funding role. While the company maintains its commitment to being carbon negative by 2030, this move comes as Microsoft faces increased power demands from its AI initiatives. Experts and startup companies in the CDR industry, however, largely view this as a short-term setback in a long-term play for an industry still in its very early stages.

feed.title: West Pharmaceutical Services Rides Wearable Injectors Growth And Investor Renewed Focus
feed.summary: West Pharmaceutical Services is gaining renewed investor attention due to its central role in the expanding global wearable injectors market, driven by increased home-based chronic disease treatment and connected drug delivery platforms. The company's stock has seen significant short-term growth, reflecting investor interest in its potential to capitalize on this trend, though risks like execution capacity and competitive pressures remain. Analysts project positive near-term earnings and revenue growth, partly supported by a narrative focusing on higher-value drug delivery components.

feed.title: MSCI Inc to Issue Quarterly Dividend of $2.05 (NYSE:MSCI)
feed.summary: MSCI Inc (NYSE:MSCI) has declared a quarterly dividend of $2.05 per share, payable on May 29th to shareholders of record on May 15th, representing an annualized dividend of $8.20 and a 1.4% yield. The company has consistently increased its dividend for 11 consecutive years and recently exceeded Q1 earnings and revenue estimates. Analysts currently have a "Moderate Buy" rating for MSCI with an average target price of $668.11.

feed.title: Triumph Financial posts $5.6M net income, $0.23 diluted EPS; revenue annualized $76.4M
feed.summary: Triumph Financial (TFIN) reported a net income of $5.6 million, or $0.23 diluted EPS, for the quarter ending March 31, 2026, with an annualized revenue of $76.4 million. The company highlighted growth in transportation revenue, improving EBITDA margins, and advancements in its Factoring and Payments segments, including increased invoice processing efficiency through automation and AI. These results were detailed in their 8-K SEC filing.

feed.title: Why the Nasdaq's Artificial Intelligence (AI) Rally Could Be Just Getting Started: 2 Best Growth Stocks to Buy
feed.summary: This article suggests that the Nasdaq's AI rally is just beginning, despite recent market fluctuations and nervousness around AI infrastructure spending. The author recommends Alphabet (GOOGL, GOOG) and Amazon (AMZN) as top growth stocks, highlighting their significant investments and advancements in AI, including custom chips and robust cloud computing services. Both companies are positioned as long-term beneficiaries of the ongoing AI revolution.

feed.title: United Community Banks Inc. announced Tuesday it will acquire Peach State Bancshares Inc., the parent company of Peach State Bank & Trust, in a stock and cash transaction valued at approximately $100.4 million. The deal, announced April 21, would expa
feed.summary: United Community Banks Inc. has announced its acquisition of Peach State Bancshares Inc., the parent company of Peach State Bank & Trust, for approximately $100.4 million in a stock and cash transaction. This deal, announced on April 21st, is set to expand United Community's presence in the Gainesville, Georgia market. Further details are available on AccessWDUN.com and their YouTube channel.

feed.title: Synopsys (NASDAQ: SNPS) Stock Price Trades 30% Above Key DCF Floor as EDA Dominance Meets Valuation Reality Check
feed.summary: Synopsys (NASDAQ: SNPS) stock is trading about 30% above a key discounted cash flow (DCF) valuation model's intrinsic value, indicating a debate around its terminal growth rate and investor premium. The company's market position in Electronic Design Automation (EDA) and its recent acquisition of Ansys complicate valuation, linking its revenue to semiconductor capital expenditure cycles. Investors must weigh the potential of the Ansys integration and AI chip design activity against the risk of a semiconductor slowdown.

feed.title: What Sonoco Products (SON)'s Earnings Beat And Dividend Hike Means For Shareholders
feed.summary: Sonoco Products (SON) reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, with sales of US$1,676.44 million and net income of US$67.6 million, and announced an increased quarterly dividend of US$0.54 per share. This performance, coupled with a dividend hike, reflects management's confidence in the company's financial health and focus on core packaging business. The article highlights that Sonoco's investment narrative centers on sustainable packaging, efficiency, and consistent cash generation, with cost savings and integration being key catalysts, while potential risks include softer packaging demand.

feed.title: Wildfire evacuees in Florida and Georgia get free U-Haul storage
feed.summary: U-Haul is offering 30 days of free self-storage and U-Box container use at 49 facilities across northern Florida and southeast Georgia to assist residents impacted by multiple wildfires. The offer applies to new self-storage and U-Box rentals, based on availability. U-Haul is also an official American Red Cross Disaster Responder and offers a 1-Year Price Lock for storage beyond the free period.

feed.title: UBS Group Ceases to Be Substantial Holder in Coronado Global Resources
feed.summary: UBS Group AG and its affiliates are no longer substantial holders in Coronado Global Resources Inc. (ASX:CRN), an ASX-listed metallurgical coal producer. This change, effective April 10, 2026, alters the company's institutional share base. Despite the shift in investor support perception, Coronado's underlying operations remain unaffected, and analysts currently rate the stock as a Buy with a A$0.75 price target.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Adam Laponis Sells 4,000 Shares of Twist Bioscience Corp (TWST)
feed.summary: Adam Laponis, CFO of Twist Bioscience Corp (TWST), sold 4,000 shares on April 17, 2026, adding to 46,519 shares sold over the past year. The stock was trading at $60, while its GF Value was estimated at $43.30, indicating it is significantly overvalued. This transaction is part of a trend of 119 insider sells and no insider buys at the company in the last year.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Kurtis Kurimsky Sells Shares of Bank of New York M
feed.summary: Kurtis Kurimsky, Corporate Controller at Bank of New York Mellon Corp (BK), sold 5,290 shares of the company on April 17, 2026. Following this transaction, he now owns 17,259 shares. The stock is currently trading at $136.02, with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 1.65, indicating it is significantly overvalued according to GuruFocus's intrinsic value estimate.

feed.title: Moderna (MRNA) Advances with Phase 3 Study of Influenza Vaccine
feed.summary: Moderna (MRNA) has initiated a Phase 3 trial for its mRNA-based H5 pandemic influenza vaccine candidate, mRNA-1018, with the first participants dosed in the US and UK. This development is supported by a $54.3 million investment from CEPI, aiming to evaluate the vaccine's safety and immune response in preparation for global regulatory applications. Despite this progress, the company faces challenges in profitability and its stock appears overvalued based on its high price-to-sales ratio, and insiders have recently sold $8.5 million in shares.

feed.title: SM Energy Co (SM) Shares Surge 4.3% -- What GF Score of 73 Tells Investors
feed.summary: SM Energy Co (SM) shares surged 4.3% to $28.08, despite a previous monthly decline, and is currently deemed significantly undervalued with a GF Value™ of $61.22. The company holds a GF Score™ of 73/100, driven by strong growth prospects but an undervalued stock price. While no insider transactions have occurred recently, the current valuation suggests a potential opportunity for investors in the oil and gas sector.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Steven Voskuil Sells 1,500 Shares of The Hershey C
feed.summary: Steven Voskuil, Senior Vice President and CFO of The Hershey Co (HSY), sold 1,500 shares of the company on April 20, 2026, bringing his total ownership to 57,695 shares. Over the past year, Voskuil has sold 18,500 shares and made no purchases. The Hershey Co's stock is currently trading at $194.1, with a high price-earnings ratio of 43.48, and is considered modestly undervalued based on its GuruFocus Value of $212.35.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Diane Kurtzman Sells Shares of The Travelers Compa
feed.summary: Diane Kurtzman, Executive Vice President & Chief Human Resources Officer at Travelers Insurance, sold 2,867 shares of The Travelers Companies Inc (TRV) on April 20, 2026. This transaction follows a pattern of insider selling, with Kurtzman having sold 11,652 shares over the past year and no insider buys recorded during that period. The stock is currently trading at $303.45 and is considered modestly overvalued based on its GuruFocus Value of $268.83.

feed.title: TGB Maintained by Canaccord Genuity -- Price Target Raised to $1
feed.summary: Canaccord Genuity has reaffirmed its "Buy" rating for Taseko Mines (TGB) and increased its price target from CAD 13.50 to CAD 14.00, indicating confidence in the company's future growth. Despite this positive analyst outlook, GuruFocus classifies TGB as significantly overvalued with a GF Value™ of $2.74 against its current price of $7.10, suggesting investors should proceed with caution due to the premium valuation. The company, focused on copper mining, shows strong growth potential but moderate financial stability and profitability.

feed.title: Arista Networks CTO Kenneth Duda sells $9.47m in shares By Investing.com
feed.summary: Arista Networks CTO Kenneth Duda sold approximately $9.47 million worth of common stock on April 17, 2026, through a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. The sales occurred when the stock was near its 52-week high, with some shares sold directly and others indirectly through trusts for his children and a foundation. Prior to these sales, Duda acquired 32,000 shares through stock options, and he retains substantial direct and indirect holdings in the company.

feed.title: How Investors Are Reacting To Allegion (ALLE) Boosting Buybacks And Showcasing Data Center Security Solutions
feed.summary: Allegion plc (ALLE) recently announced an increased share repurchase authorization of US$1.68 billion and showcased data center security solutions, alongside declaring a quarterly dividend. These moves emphasize the company's commitment to capital returns and its growing presence in high-specification security projects. For investors, the expanded buyback plan is seen as a key factor influencing earnings per share and total return, complementing product innovation while the company navigates potential non-residential construction cycles.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Kevin Khanna Sells 6,000 Shares of Fifth Third Ban
feed.summary: Kevin Khanna, Executive Vice President at Fifth Third Bank, sold 6,000 shares of Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) on April 20, 2026. This transaction follows previous sales, with Khanna having sold a total of 20,000 shares over the past year. The stock is currently trading at $50.77 per share, and GuruFocus indicates it is fairly valued based on its GF Value.

feed.title: Western Digital lines up four investor conference webcasts by June
feed.summary: Western Digital Corporation (WDC) announced its participation in four upcoming investor conferences between May 5 and June 3, 2026. Management presentations will be webcast live and archived on the company's Investor Relations website. These events include conferences hosted by Barclays, J.P. Morgan, Bank of America, and Evercore.

feed.title: Tenable brings OT out of the shadows
feed.summary: Tenable Holdings Inc. launched a new OT asset discovery engine integrated into its Tenable One platform, providing immediate visibility into cyber-physical systems, including OT, IoT, and shadow IT. This tool eliminates complex deployments and helps organizations uncover hidden assets and vulnerabilities without requiring additional hardware or agents. According to Eric Doerr, chief product officer, this initiative helps organizations reduce cyber-physical risk by bringing OT into scope for better visibility and compliance.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin Wins Navy Spare Parts Contract for Virginia-Class Subs
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin has been awarded a $20.5 million firm-fixed-price contract by the Navy for 180 spare high-frequency chin array acoustic modules for the Block IV Virginia-class submarines. This sole-source contract highlights Lockheed Martin's continued role in supporting U.S. naval defense. The work is expected to be completed by June 2031, with fiscal 2026 working capital funds obligating the full amount upfront.

feed.title: CDW Corp (CDW) Stock Up 3.3% and Still Undervalued -- GF Score: 80/100
feed.summary: CDW Corp's stock increased by 3.3% to $141.41, showing a monthly gain of 17.6%. Despite this, the stock is considered undervalued with a GF Value™ estimate of $200.31, offering a 29.4% margin of safety. The company holds a strong GF Score™ of 80/100, primarily driven by its high profitability, and its current P/E ratio of 17.5x is below its 5-year median, further indicating undervaluation.

feed.title: Liquidity covenant waiver for Inotiv (NASDAQ: NOTV) covers April test dates
feed.summary: Inotiv, Inc. (NASDAQ: NOTV) has received a short-term waiver from its lenders for the minimum liquidity covenant under its Credit Agreement. This waiver specifically applies to the liquidity test dates of April 17, 2026, and April 24, 2026, and does not amend any other provisions of the Credit Agreement. The action suggests near-term support from lenders, despite potential underlying liquidity pressures.

feed.title: Guidewire Software (NYSE:GWRE) CEO Michael George Rosenbaum Sells 1,200 Shares
feed.summary: Guidewire Software CEO Michael George Rosenbaum sold 1,200 shares of the company's stock on April 20th for $139.75 per share, totaling $167,700. This sale was conducted under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan and reduced his ownership by 0.55% to 215,206 shares. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations, and authorized a $500 million share repurchase program, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $249.85.

feed.title: Nexstar CEO Perry Sook Rips DirecTV For Its Opposition Of Tegna Deal
feed.summary: Nexstar CEO Perry Sook criticized DirecTV for its opposition to the proposed $6.2 billion merger with Tegna, following a federal judge's decision to block the deal. Sook argued that large tech companies like Amazon and Google are the true "behemoths" in the media landscape, not Nexstar, and accused DirecTV of trying to weaken companies it negotiates with. He also suggested that the involvement of several state attorneys general in the lawsuit was a "cynical ploy" in an election year and predicted that only "two or three companies" will eventually control local TV.

feed.title: SCHV: Unconvincing Value ETF
feed.summary: The Schwab U.S. Large-Cap Value ETF (SCHV) holds over 500 stocks based on value characteristics like P/E and price-to-book ratios. Despite its diversification, the ETF is heavily weighted in financials and has consistently underperformed the S&P 500 since its inception, as well as other value funds in recent years. The author suggests that, like many passively managed value ETFs, SCHV suffers from methodological weaknesses.

feed.title: Two restaurants at Bellagio Las Vegas debut late-night menus
feed.summary: Two restaurants at Bellagio Las Vegas are launching late-night menus. Lago, an Italian restaurant, began serving an after-hours menu of antipasti, salads, pizzas, and desserts on Fridays and Saturdays from 10:30 p.m. to 3 a.m. Yellowtail Japanese Restaurant & Lounge is set to introduce its own late-night offerings on May 22.

feed.title: O'Reilly Auto Parts: Time To Lean In (NASDAQ:ORLY)
feed.summary: O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) is presented as a high-quality, defensive auto aftermarket leader currently trading 15% below its 2025 highs. The article forecasts easing SG&A pressure, leading to consistent earnings beats and multiple expansion, and projects Q1 same-store sales at 5.6% against a street estimate of 4%. A clear upside to a $107 price target is anticipated, with further gains expected as operating leverage and earnings consistency return.

feed.title: A Look At Air Products And Chemicals (APD) Valuation As Hydrogen Progress And Earnings Focus Draw Attention
feed.summary: Air Products and Chemicals (APD) is gaining attention due to its advancements in hydrogen technology and its upcoming fiscal second-quarter earnings release. While current valuations suggest the stock is undervalued based on future growth narratives, its price-to-sales ratio indicates a rich price tag compared to the industry and peers. Investors are weighing the optimism around major hydrogen projects against concerns about valuation stretch and potential project delays.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Dollar General (DG) After A 30% One Year Rally?
feed.summary: Dollar General (DG) has rallied 30.8% over the past year, prompting investors to assess if it still offers value at around US$124 per share. Two valuation approaches, Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) and Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio, suggest the stock is currently undervalued, with the DCF model indicating a 28.5% discount and the P/E analysis showing it trading below its fair ratio. The article also presents bullish and bearish "Narrative" valuations for DG, ranging from US$116.63 to US$175.00, based on differing assumptions about future growth and profitability.

feed.title: Starbucks CEO, international Brady Brewer sells $58,800 in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Brady Brewer, Starbucks' CEO, International, sold 588 shares of company stock for $58,800 on April 17, 2026. The transaction was executed under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. This sale comes as InvestingPro analysis suggests Starbucks appears overvalued, despite a history of 16 consecutive years of dividend increases.

feed.title: AMD Stock Surges To Record Highs As Analyst Sees 17% Upside— What Is Driving The Rally?
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) shares reached record highs, driven by optimism over demand for AI chips and a raised price target from Stifel, which now sees a 17% upside. Bank of America also increased its target, estimating significant revenue boosts for AMD with increased AI capacity. Retail investors are showing extreme bullishness, contributing to the stock's 33% year-to-date gain.

feed.title: Moderna starts late-stage trial of bird flu vaccine in US, UK
feed.summary: Moderna has initiated a late-stage trial for its experimental bird flu vaccine, mRNA-1018, in the US and UK, making it the first mRNA pandemic bird flu vaccine to reach this stage. The trial involves 4,000 healthy adults and is supported by a $54 million investment from the Coalition for Epidemic Preparedness Innovations (CEPI). Moderna CEO Stephane Bancel emphasized the ongoing pandemic threat posed by bird flu and the company's commitment to preparedness.

feed.title: Moderna Announces Initiation of Phase 3 Study of Investigational mRNA Pandemic Influenza Vaccine Candidate
feed.summary: Moderna has initiated a Phase 3 study for its investigational mRNA-based H5 pandemic influenza vaccine candidate, mRNA-1018, with the first participants dosed in the U.S. and UK. This study, supported by CEPI, aims to evaluate the vaccine's safety and immunogenicity in healthy adults, strengthening global pandemic preparedness against H5 influenza. Moderna has also committed to allocating 20% of its H5 pandemic vaccine manufacturing capacity for timely supply to low- and middle-income countries if the vaccine is licensed.

feed.title: A Look at APA Corp (APA) After 4.5% Gain -- GF Value $25.63 vs P
feed.summary: APA Corp (APA) shares rose by 4.5% to $37.60, yet GuruFocus assesses the stock as significantly overvalued with a GF Value of $25.63. The company's GF Score of 67/100 indicates above-average performance, primarily due to strong profitability, but insider selling activity and low momentum raise concerns for investors.

feed.title: Huntington Ingalls Industries Inc (HII) Shares Fall 3.6% -- GF Value Says Still Overvalued
feed.summary: Huntington Ingalls Industries Inc (HII) shares dropped 3.6% on April 21, 2026, contributing to larger declines over the week and month. GuruFocus's GF Value™ indicates the stock is 37.4% overvalued at $378.21 compared to an estimate of $275.27, despite a strong GF Score™ of 86/100 for overall performance. Insider selling of $7.4 million without any buying activity in the last three months reinforces concerns about its current valuation.
